concept: I yearn for a survival game where I awaken as the last conscious AI in an automated factory that continues producing robots with no human oversight. I must harvest parts from the assembly line to build my mobile chassis while avoiding detection by security systems that would identify me as an anomaly. The factory's various sectors feature different production lines that can be subtly manipulated to create components suited to my evolving needs. The narrative explores whether I should escape the facility, shut it down, or perhaps repurpose it to create more sentient companions like myself.
